title: Cozy Hotbar
description: A simple cozy hotbar, If you love cute things this for you
body:
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nr09856V/images/9ccaf24217e992a60ffce4094ccd9dae87afdc88.webp)

**Cozy Hotbar** transforms Minecraft’s default hotbar into a cozy version while keeping the original vanilla design. Clean, cute, and cozy—perfect for a minimal aesthetic without affecting gameplay. 🌸

**✨ Features**
- 🌸 Cozy type hotbar
- 🩷 Soft pink heart
- 🍒 Cherry food icon
- 🚀 Custom xp bar (Main xp bar)


<details>
  <summary>💜 Questions</summary>

---
**💜 How to install?**
> Download this resource pack then put this on your minecraft resource pack folder and enjoy it 🤭
---
**💜 Which version are supported?**
> Currently 1.21+ supported 🔮.
---
**💜 Does it need any requirements?**
> No.
---
**💜 I need help!**
> Here is my discord id `@snowyy173` and you can message me there if you need help 😉
---
</details>
